payload.tactic: while (c{1} = c{2} /\ size p{1} = size p{2} /\ size c{1} + size p{1} <= max_cipher_size /\ 1 <= i{1} /\ i{1} - 1 + (size p{1} + block_size - 1) %/ block_size <= C.max_counter /\ n{1} = n0 /\ mr0 = ROin.m{1} /\ ms0 = ROout.m{1} /\ (forall (nn : nonce) (cc : C.counter), (nn, cc) \in ROF.m{1} => nn \in n0 :: BNR.lenc{1}) /\ (forall (cc : C.counter), (n0, cc) \in ROF.m{1} => C.toint cc < i{1})).
